description: VERIFIED LIVE: QQ音乐 (QQ Music) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Song rows on a toplist/album/playlist link to /songDetail/<mid> with the song name as link text. Navigate the tab to y.qq.com (a toplist like /n/ryqq/toplist/26, an album, or a playlist) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 20 songs — name + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: qqmusic_songs
tools.description: Songs on the current QQ音乐 page (a toplist, album, or playlist). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each song's name and url (/songDetail/<mid>). VERIFIED (20 songs).
